ddls:
CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Three-letter code for the airport */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the airport is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the airport is located */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the airport */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the airport */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the airport in feet */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Three-letter code for the airport */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather data */,
  "fog" INTEGER /* Presence of fog (0/1) */,
  "hail" INTEGER /* Presence of hail (0/1) */,
  "maxtempm" INTEGER /* Maximum temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "meantempm" INTEGER /* Mean temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "meanvism" INTEGER /* Mean visibility in meters */,
  "meanwindspdm" INTEGER /* Mean wind speed in meters per second */,
  "mintempm" INTEGER /* Minimum temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "precipm" REAL /* Precipitation in millimeters */,
  "rain" INTEGER /* Presence of rain (0/1) */,
  "snow" INTEGER /* Presence of snow (0/1) */,
  "thunder" INTEGER /* Presence of thunderstorms (0/1) */,
  "tornado" INTEGER /* Presence of tornadoes (0/1) */,
  "wind_dir" TEXT /* Wind direction */,
  "cloud_cover" INTEGER /* Cloud cover percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_airport_code FOREIGN KEY ("airport_code") REFERENCES airports ("airport_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather dataset */,
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Three-letter code for the airport */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather dataset */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the weather dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_datasets_airport_code FOREIGN KEY ("airport_code") REFERENCES airports ("airport_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_dataset_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather dataset */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_dataset_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES weather_datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_delays" (
  "delay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight delay entry */,
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Three-letter code for the airport */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the flight delay data */,
  "ArrDelay_mean" REAL /* Mean arrival delay in minutes */,
  "LateArrMean" REAL /* Mean late arrival delay in minutes */,
  "LatePercnt" REAL /* Percentage of late arrivals */,
  "ArrClass" INTEGER /* Arrival class (0/1) */,
  "CarrierCode" TEXT /* Carrier code */,
  "FlightNum" INTEGER /* Flight number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_delays_airport_code FOREIGN KEY ("airport_code") REFERENCES airports ("airport_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "delay_datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight delay dataset */,
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Three-letter code for the airport */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the flight delay dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the flight delay dataset */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the flight delay dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delay_datasets_airport_code FOREIGN KEY ("airport_code") REFERENCES airports ("airport_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "delay_dataset_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight delay dataset */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delay_dataset_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES delay_datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "delay_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight delay data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the flight delay data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the flight delay data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_delay_id FOREIGN KEY ("delay_id") REFERENCES flight_delays ("delay_id")
)
